A

AVLNode<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
A node for AVL trees storing extra fields for height and parent.
AVLNode(E) - Constructor for class AVLNode
Constructs an AVLNode with the given data.
AVLTree<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
An AVL tree extending BinarySearchTree.
AVLTree() - Constructor for class AVLTree
 

B

BinaryNode<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a node in a binary tree.
BinaryNode(E) - Constructor for class BinaryNode
Constructs a BinaryNode with the given data.
BinarySearchTree<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
A generic binary search tree extending BinaryTree.
BinarySearchTree() - Constructor for class BinarySearchTree
 
BinaryTree<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
Generic abstract binary tree implementing the Tree interface.
BinaryTree() - Constructor for class BinaryTree
Constructs an empty BinaryTree.

C

contains(E) - Method in class BinarySearchTree
Efficiently searches for an element using BST ordering.
contains(E) - Method in class BinaryTree
Checks if the tree contains the element by checking every node.
contains(E) - Method in interface Tree
Checks whether the tree contains the given element.

D

data - Variable in class BinaryNode
The data stored in this node.

E

empty() - Method in class BinaryTree
Clears the tree by setting root to null.
empty() - Method in interface Tree
Removes all elements from the tree.

G

getData() - Method in class BinaryNode
Returns the data stored in this node.
getHeight() - Method in class AVLNode
Returns the height of this node.
getLeft() - Method in class BinaryNode
Returns the left child.
getParent() - Method in class AVLNode
Returns the parent of this node.
getRight() - Method in class BinaryNode
Returns the right child.

H

height - Variable in class AVLNode
Height of the subtree rooted at this node.

I

inOrderString() - Method in class BinaryTree
Returns an inorder traversal string: left then root then right.
inOrderString() - Method in interface Tree
Returns a string of elements using inorder traversal.
insert(E) - Method in class AVLTree
Inserts the element and rebalances the tree as needed.
insert(E) - Method in class BinarySearchTree
Inserts the element into the BST using natural ordering.
insert(E) - Method in interface Tree
Inserts the given element into the tree.
isEmpty() - Method in class BinaryTree
Returns true if the tree has no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in interface Tree
Returns true if the tree has no elements.

L

left - Variable in class BinaryNode
Left and right child references.

P

parent - Variable in class AVLNode
Reference to the parent node.
postOrderString() - Method in class BinaryTree
Returns a postorder traversal string: left then right then root.
postOrderString() - Method in interface Tree
Returns a string of elements using postorder traversal.
preOrderString() - Method in class BinaryTree
Returns a preorder traversal string: root then left then right.
preOrderString() - Method in interface Tree
Returns a string of elements using preorder traversal.

R

right - Variable in class BinaryNode
 
root - Variable in class BinaryTree
The root node of the tree.

Sets the data for this node.
